mapper.select:
SELECT e.ERROR_ID, e.DEVICE_ID, e.ERROR_CODE_ID, e.ERROR_MESSAGE, e.ERROR_LEVEL, e.ERROR_FLAG, e.OCCUR_AT, e.USER_MESSAGE, e.UPDATE_AT, e.DEVICE_IP, e.IF_IP_ADDRESS, d.DEVICE_NAME, g.GROUP_NAME FROM f_error_t e LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID LEFT JOIN r_model_t m ON d.MODEL_ID = m.MODEL_ID LEFT JOIN r_group_t g ON d.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID WHERE 1=1
AND e.ERROR_LEVEL = #{errorLevel}
AND e.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
AND m.DEV_CODE_ID IN ( WITH RECURSIVE dev_code_tree AS ( SELECT DEV_CODE_ID FROM b_dev_code_t WHERE DEV_CODE_ID = #{devCodeId} UNION ALL SELECT dc.DEV_CODE_ID FROM b_dev_code_t dc INNER JOIN dev_code_tree dct ON dc.PARENT_DEV_CODE_ID = dct.DEV_CODE_ID ) SELECT DEV_CODE_ID FROM dev_code_tree )
AND d.DEVICE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
AND e.DEVICE_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceIp}, '%')
AND e.ERROR_MESSAGE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{errorMessage}, '%')
AND g.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%')
ORDER BY e.OCCUR_AT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM f_error_t e LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID LEFT JOIN r_model_t m ON d.MODEL_ID = m.MODEL_ID LEFT JOIN r_group_t g ON d.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID WHERE 1=1
AND e.ERROR_LEVEL = #{errorLevel}
AND e.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
AND m.DEV_CODE_ID IN ( WITH RECURSIVE dev_code_tree AS ( SELECT DEV_CODE_ID FROM b_dev_code_t WHERE DEV_CODE_ID = #{devCodeId} UNION ALL SELECT dc.DEV_CODE_ID FROM b_dev_code_t dc INNER JOIN dev_code_tree dct ON dc.PARENT_DEV_CODE_ID = dct.DEV_CODE_ID ) SELECT DEV_CODE_ID FROM dev_code_tree )
AND d.DEVICE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
AND e.DEVICE_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceIp}, '%')
AND e.ERROR_MESSAGE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{errorMessage}, '%')
AND g.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%')

SELECT e.ERROR_ID, e.DEVICE_ID, e.ERROR_CODE_ID, e.ERROR_MESSAGE, e.ERROR_LEVEL, e.ERROR_FLAG, e.OCCUR_AT, e.USER_MESSAGE, e.UPDATE_AT, e.DEVICE_IP, e.IF_IP_ADDRESS, d.DEVICE_NAME FROM f_error_t e LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE e.ERROR_ID = #{errorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE f_error_t SET ERROR_FLAG = #{errorFlag}, USER_MESSAGE = #{userMessage}, UPDATE_AT = NOW() WHERE ERROR_ID = #{errorId}
mapper.select:
SELECT h.ERROR_HISTORY_ID, h.ERROR_ID, h.DEVICE_ID, h.ERROR_CODE_ID, h.ERROR_MESSAGE, h.ERROR_LEVEL, h.OCCUR_AT, h.CLEAR_AT, h.USER_MESSAGE, h.UPDATE_AT, h.DEVICE_IP, d.DEVICE_NAME, g.GROUP_NAME FROM f_error_history_t h LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON h.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID LEFT JOIN r_model_t m ON d.MODEL_ID = m.MODEL_ID LEFT JOIN r_group_t g ON d.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID WHERE 1=1
AND h.ERROR_LEVEL = #{errorLevel}
AND h.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
AND m.DEV_CODE_ID IN ( WITH RECURSIVE dev_code_tree AS ( SELECT DEV_CODE_ID FROM b_dev_code_t WHERE DEV_CODE_ID = #{devCodeId} UNION ALL SELECT dc.DEV_CODE_ID FROM b_dev_code_t dc INNER JOIN dev_code_tree dct ON dc.PARENT_DEV_CODE_ID = dct.DEV_CODE_ID ) SELECT DEV_CODE_ID FROM dev_code_tree )
AND h.OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate}
AND h.OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND d.DEVICE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
AND h.DEVICE_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceIp}, '%')
AND h.ERROR_MESSAGE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{errorMessage}, '%')
AND g.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%')
ORDER BY
FIELD(h.ERROR_LEVEL, 'C', 'M', 'N', 'W') d.DEVICE_NAME h.DEVICE_IP g.GROUP_NAME h.ERROR_MESSAGE h.OCCUR_AT h.CLEAR_AT
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT h.ERROR_HISTORY_ID, h.ERROR_ID, h.DEVICE_ID, h.ERROR_CODE_ID, h.ERROR_MESSAGE, h.ERROR_LEVEL, h.OCCUR_AT, h.CLEAR_AT, h.USER_MESSAGE, h.UPDATE_AT, h.DEVICE_IP, d.DEVICE_NAME FROM f_error_history_t h LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON h.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE h.ERROR_HISTORY_ID = #{errorHistoryId}

SELECT COALESCE(e.ERROR_LEVEL, 'UNKNOWN') AS LEVEL_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM f_error_t e JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY e.ERROR_LEVEL

SELECT ec.ERROR_CODE_NM AS ERROR_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM f_error_t e JOIN b_error_code_t ec ON e.ERROR_CODE_ID = ec.ERROR_CODE_ID JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY ec.ERROR_CODE_NM ORDER BY CNT DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(dt.OCCUR_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS STAT_DATE, COALESCE(SUM(dt.OCCURRED), 0) AS OCCURRED, COALESCE(SUM(dt.CLEARED), 0) AS CLEARED FROM ( SELECT DATE(h.OCCUR_AT) AS OCCUR_DATE, 1 AS OCCURRED, 0 AS CLEARED FROM f_error_history_t h JOIN r_device_t d ON h.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE h.OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate} AND h.OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
UNION ALL SELECT DATE(e.OCCUR_AT) AS OCCUR_DATE, 1 AS OCCURRED, 0 AS CLEARED FROM f_error_t e JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE e.OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate} AND e.OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
UNION ALL SELECT DATE(h2.CLEAR_AT) AS OCCUR_DATE, 0 AS OCCURRED, 1 AS CLEARED FROM f_error_history_t h2 JOIN r_device_t d ON h2.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE h2.CLEAR_AT >= #{startDate} AND h2.CLEAR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
) dt GROUP BY dt.OCCUR_DATE ORDER BY dt.OCCUR_DATE

SELECT dt.HOUR_VAL AS STAT_HOUR, COALESCE(SUM(dt.OCCURRED), 0) AS OCCURRED, COALESCE(SUM(dt.CLEARED), 0) AS CLEARED FROM ( SELECT HOUR(h.OCCUR_AT) AS HOUR_VAL, 1 AS OCCURRED, 0 AS CLEARED FROM f_error_history_t h JOIN r_device_t d ON h.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE h.OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate} AND h.OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
UNION ALL SELECT HOUR(e.OCCUR_AT) AS HOUR_VAL, 1 AS OCCURRED, 0 AS CLEARED FROM f_error_t e JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE e.OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate} AND e.OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
UNION ALL SELECT HOUR(h2.CLEAR_AT) AS HOUR_VAL, 0 AS OCCURRED, 1 AS CLEARED FROM f_error_history_t h2 JOIN r_device_t d ON h2.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE h2.CLEAR_AT >= #{startDate} AND h2.CLEAR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
) dt GROUP BY dt.HOUR_VAL ORDER BY dt.HOUR_VAL

SELECT ec.ERROR_CODE_NM AS ERROR_TYPE, ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, h.OCCUR_AT, h.CLEAR_AT))) AS AVG_SECONDS, MIN(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, h.OCCUR_AT, h.CLEAR_AT)) AS MIN_SECONDS, MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, h.OCCUR_AT, h.CLEAR_AT)) AS MAX_SECONDS, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM f_error_history_t h JOIN b_error_code_t ec ON h.ERROR_CODE_ID = ec.ERROR_CODE_ID JOIN r_device_t d ON h.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE h.CLEAR_AT IS NOT NULL
AND h.OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate}
AND h.OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
GROUP BY ec.ERROR_CODE_NM ORDER BY AVG_SECONDS DESC

SELECT dt.DEVICE_ID, d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_IP, g.GROUP_NAME, SUM(dt.TOTAL_CNT) AS TOTAL_CNT, SUM(dt.ACTIVE_CNT) AS ACTIVE_CNT FROM ( SELECT DEVICE_ID, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT, 0 AS ACTIVE_CNT FROM f_error_history_t WHERE OCCUR_AT >= #{startDate} AND OCCUR_AT <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY DEVICE_ID UNION ALL SELECT DEVICE_ID, COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT, COUNT(*) AS ACTIVE_CNT FROM f_error_t GROUP BY DEVICE_ID ) dt JOIN r_device_t d ON dt.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID LEFT JOIN r_group_t g ON d.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY dt.DEVICE_ID, d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_IP, g.GROUP_NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_CNT DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, e.OCCUR_AT, NOW()) < 1 THEN '1h_under' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, e.OCCUR_AT, NOW()) < 6 THEN '1h_6h' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, e.OCCUR_AT, NOW()) < 24 THEN '6h_24h' ELSE '24h_over' END AS AGE_GROUP, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM f_error_t e JOIN r_device_t d ON e.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY AGE_GROUP ORDER BY FIELD(AGE_GROUP, '1h_under', '1h_6h', '6h_24h', '24h_over')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO f_error_history_t (ERROR_ID, DEVICE_ID, ERROR_CODE_ID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_LEVEL, OCCUR_AT, CLEAR_AT, USER_MESSAGE, UPDATE_AT, DEVICE_IP) SELECT ERROR_ID, DEVICE_ID, ERROR_CODE_ID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_LEVEL, OCCUR_AT, NOW(), '장비 삭제로 인한 자동 해소', NOW(), DEVICE_IP FROM f_error_t WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}

INSERT INTO f_error_history_t (ERROR_ID, DEVICE_ID, ERROR_CODE_ID, ERROR_MESSAGE, ERROR_LEVEL, OCCUR_AT, CLEAR_AT, USER_MESSAGE, UPDATE_AT, DEVICE_IP) SELECT e.ERROR_ID, e.DEVICE_ID, e.ERROR_CODE_ID, e.ERROR_MESSAGE, e.ERROR_LEVEL, e.OCCUR_AT, NOW(), '포트 삭제로 인한 자동 해소', NOW(), e.DEVICE_IP FROM f_error_t e INNER JOIN r_port_t p ON e.DEVICE_ID = p.DEVICE_ID AND e.IF_INDEX = p.IF_INDEX WHERE e.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND p.DELETE_AT IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE e FROM f_error_t e INNER JOIN r_port_t p ON e.DEVICE_ID = p.DEVICE_ID AND e.IF_INDEX = p.IF_INDEX WHERE e.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND p.DELETE_AT IS NOT NULL
